primary_expression_ocr: image has a line-level or cell-level chemical expression label
label preserves superscripts, subscripts, charges, arrows, and reaction conditions
ground truth can be converted or audited toward mhchem
structure_ocsr: image is a molecular structure depiction or reaction diagram
label provides SMILES, molfile, graph, bounding box, or segmentation metadata
sample is used for structure recognition, not as direct mhchem equation OCR

recommended_use: mine pseudo-chemical-equation records for reaction JSON normalization
limitations: labels are LaTeX, not native mhchem
records are cell-level or record-level, not full-page document parsing
real-world test set is small and should be kept for evaluation

recommended_use: detect chemical structure regions before OCSR
extract structure crops from scientific pages
limitations: does not provide mhchem equation OCR labels
main target is structure depiction segmentation

recommended_use: convert molecular structure crops to SMILES or graph JSON
combine structure outputs with reaction-level JSON
limitations: not designed for text chemical equation OCR
does not normalize LaTeX or mhchem expressions

recommended_use: patent-domain molecular structure retrieval and evaluation
large-scale weakly supervised structure data only after separate quality control
limitations: not a direct source of mhchem equation ground truth
full data should not be mixed into the first OCR training round
